name: @amlhubs/rdfs
description: RDF Schema 1.1 (W3C Rec 2014-02-25) — extensible base classes and interfaces for the RDFS vocabulary-description metamodel layered on RDF: rdfs:Resource, rdfs:Class, rdfs:Literal, rdfs:Datatype, rdfs:Container, rdfs:ContainerMembershipProperty, and the core RDFS properties (subClassOf, subPropertyOf, domain, range, label, comment, seeAlso, isDefinedBy, member). Pure RDFS, peers on @amlhubs/rdf for the underlying triple/IRI/Literal primitives.
